title: Conservancy to protect biodiversity in the Karoo
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - A long-cherished dream has...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - A long-cherished dream has come true with the establishment of the 18 000ha Karoo Gateway Conservancy in the Klaarstroom district.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - A long-cherished dream has come true with the establishment of the 18 000ha Karoo Gateway Conservancy in the Klaarstroom district."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This initiative provides a strong framework for biodiversity conservation in the region through a voluntary agreement among landowners to manage their land in an environmentally sustainable way that promotes biodiversity conservation, eco-tourism, and sustainable agriculture."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Karoo Gateway Conservancy was founded by a group of local farmers who share a deep love for nature and a passion for protecting the region's unique fauna and flora.","html":"The Karoo Gateway Conservancy was founded by a group of local farmers who share a deep love for nature and a passion for protecting the region's unique fauna and flora."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To help drive this initiative, experienced conservationists and FGASA-registered field guides, Stephen Moss and Shania Finscham, work closely with stakeholders on the ground.","html":"To help drive this initiative, experienced conservationists and FGASA-registered field guides, Stephen Moss and Shania Finscham, work closely with stakeholders on the ground."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CapeNature has welcomed this initiative and will act as a custodian, providing expert input and guidance on management plans and biodiversity assessments, and may also offer funding support.","html":"CapeNature has welcomed this initiative and will act as a custodian, providing expert input and guidance on management plans and biodiversity assessments, and may also offer funding support."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Karoo Gateway Conservancy will become part of the network of recognised conservancies in the Western Cape, officially falling under the CapeNature-supported network.","html":"The Karoo Gateway Conservancy will become part of the network of recognised conservancies in the Western Cape, officially falling under the CapeNature-supported network."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Landowners who are considering having their land formally protected can contact CapeNature's Tom Barry on [email protected] and Melita Weideman on [email protected].","html":"Landowners who are considering having their land formally protected can contact CapeNature's Tom Barry on [email protected] and Melita Weideman on [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Conservancy to protect biodiversity in the Karoo
